title: CraftMine - Definitive Edition
description: CraftMine – Definitive Edition is a modpack for Minecraft 25w14craftmine that improves gameplay with quality-of-life mods and mainly the CraftMineFix mod.
body:
## Message to the Modrinth moderators This new modpack is currently in a work in progress. I'm having trouble preventing the new **25w14 Craftmine Bug Fixes** Mod from crashing when it tries to build a **Mine** which isn't supposed to crash on fabric? The Mod was added because it's mostly the reason why I even called the Modpack **Definitive Edition** and it being the best way to experience CraftMine snapshot. # CraftMine – Definitive Edition Welcome to the **CraftMine – Definitive Edition** Modpack designed for **25w14craftmine**! This modpack tidies up bugs, optimizes performance, and adds known and useful quality-of-life enhancements. It's built to improve your CraftMine experince. If there is any issues feel free to report it to [https://github.com/aricloverEXTRA/CraftMine-Definitive-Edition/issues](https://github.com/aricloverEXTRA/CraftMine-Definitive-Edition/issues)! ## Included Mods - **[25w14 Craftmine Bug Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftmine-fixes)** (by @zly2006, v0.30)
Patches up known CraftMine bugs in the game for a better experience, which is the main point of this Modpack. - **[Better Biome Reblend](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbrb)** (by @Untitled Mod Group, v1.5.2)
Optimizes Biome Blending - **[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)** (by @ishland, v0.3.3)
Designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft. - **[Customizable Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)** (by @tom5454, v0.6.21)
Customize your minecraft avatar! - **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)** (by @juliand665, v3.9.4)
Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background, idle, or on battery. - **[Enchantment Level Language Patch](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchlevel-langpatch)** (by @teddyxlandlee, v3.0.0)
Sharpness enchantment.level.20 => Sharpness 20/XX - **[Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)** (by @Snownee, v18.0.3)
Shows information about what you are looking at. - **[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)** (by @LambdAurora, v4.2.6)
Adds dynamic lights to Minecraft. - **[Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)** (by @yurisuika, v4.0.1)
Raises the hotbar so the selector is not cut off! - **[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)** (by @Patbox)
Placeholder and Text manipulation library for your Minecraft mods. ## Included Resource Packs - **[Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)** (by @nebulr, v2024.6.0)
Gives the Minecraft GUI a darker look while maintaining the vanilla textures, even supports some mods. But I consider this outdated as it lacks support for Minecraft 1.21.2+. - **[Default Dark Mode: Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion)** (by @Aric3435, v2025.7.1)
Expands **Default Dark Mode** to support even more mods, even supports the **25w14craftmine** snapshot. ---
